description: Standard Romanian Chart of Accounts. Complete classes 1-8. CPP groupings based on OMFP 1802 Annex for Cont Profit si Pierdere. Special flags: pl_closing (121), profit_distribution (129), profit_tax (691), micro_tax (698). Tier 1 of the 3-tier mapping architecture — read-only, shared across all tenants. Pending accountant review (see docs/ro/intrebari-contabil-plan-conturi.md).
